question: The VLSI was used in .......... generation computers.
subject: Computer Fundamentals
explanation: VLSI (Very Large Scale Integration) was used in fourth generation computers.

question: Which symbol is used to represent group of any characters?
subject: Computer Fundamentals
explanation: Asterisk (*) represents any group of characters.

question: When was the CRAY-I super computer built?
subject: Computer History
explanation: CRAY-I supercomputer was built in 1976.

question: Which switch will be used in Dir to see a screenful contents of disk at a time?
subject: DOS Commands
explanation: /p switch shows one screen at a time.

question: When was the P4 computer introduced?
subject: Computer History
explanation: Pentium 4 was introduced in 2000.

question: Which is not invalid user file name?
subject: Operating System
explanation: Ram.txt is a valid filename.

question: The memory serves as a buffer between processor and memory is..........
subject: Computer Memory
explanation: Cache memory acts as a buffer between CPU and main memory.

question: Which is not valid alphabet for attribute setting?
subject: DOS Commands
explanation: C is not a valid attribute letter (R=Read-only, S=System, H=Hidden).

question: The memory which allocate space for DOS and application is called..........
subject: Computer Memory
explanation: Conventional memory is used by DOS and applications.

question: Which will not create a sub directory on disk?
subject: DOS Commands
explanation: Chdir (cd) only changes directory, does not create one.

question: The data density of tape is measured in..........
subject: Storage Devices
explanation: Tape density is measured in bits per inch (BPI).

question: The command sorts the fragments of file and enhanced the performance of disk is..........
subject: DOS Commands
explanation: Defrag defragments files to improve disk performance.

question: Which directory can not be created by MD command?
subject: DOS Commands
explanation: Root directory already exists and cannot be created by MD.

question: Which is the system software?
subject: System Software
explanation: Operating system, compiler and utilities are all system software.

question: The command allows you to show the status of disk.
subject: DOS Commands
explanation: Chkdsk checks disk status and file system integrity.

question: The most of the input devices consist .......... for signal conversion.
subject: Input Devices
explanation: Input devices use encoders to convert signals.

question: What will be the command if you want to copy ra.doc file that resides in the floppy disk into work sub-directory of hard-disk while you are in c-prompt.
subject: DOS Commands
explanation: Copy from source a:/ra.doc to destination c:/work.

question: The latest 16-bit Unicode can represent the .......... symbols.
subject: Computer Fundamentals
explanation: 16-bit Unicode can represent 2^16 = 65536 symbols.

question: The system files are resides in the .......... after booting process.
subject: Computer Memory
explanation: System files are loaded into RAM after booting.

question: The input device is used for examination paper.
subject: Input Devices
explanation: OMR (Optical Mark Recognition) is used for reading examination papers.

question: The break checking command is..........
subject: DOS Commands
explanation: Ctrl+C is used to break/terminate a running command.

question: The full form of MICR is..........
subject: Input Devices
explanation: MICR = Magnetic Ink Character Recognition.

question: The .......... enables the user to load device drivers and programs into upper memory area while running DOS in 386 or higher microprocessor.
subject: DOS Configuration
explanation: Emm386.exe manages extended memory and upper memory blocks.

question: Which one is fast accessible?
subject: Computer Memory
explanation: CPU registers are the fastest accessible memory.

question: The command will display the history of operating system.
subject: DOS Commands
explanation: Ver command displays the DOS version information.

question: The branch of science that deals with helping machine to solve complex problems like human fashion.
subject: Computer Science
explanation: Artificial Intelligence deals with machine problem-solving like humans.

question: The Highest digit symbol of hexadecimal is..........
subject: Number Systems
explanation: Hexadecimal digits go from 0-9 and A-F; F is the highest (15).

question: The data transfer rate of USB cable is measured in terms of .......... bit per second.
subject: Computer Hardware
explanation: USB data transfer rate is measured in Megabits per second (Mbps).

question: Which is an internal command?
subject: DOS Commands
explanation: Path is an internal DOS command.

question: The output device is used for meeting and conference.
subject: Output Devices
explanation: LCD projector is used for presentations in meetings and conferences.

question: The system software which translates an instruction at a time from source program and execute it.
subject: System Software
explanation: Interpreter translates and executes one instruction at a time.

question: The multi-user operating system is..........
subject: Operating System
explanation: Linux, Unix and Windows 2000 all support multiple users.

question: Which is not function of operating system?
subject: Operating System
explanation: Detecting virus is the function of antivirus software, not the OS.

question: The software are made available free of charge on trial based software are called..........
subject: Software Types
explanation: Shareware is trial-based software available for free initially.

question: When was MS-Windows introduced?
subject: Computer History
explanation: Microsoft Windows was introduced in 1985 (Windows 1.0).

question: The second generation computer is..........
subject: Computer History
explanation: IBM-1400 series belongs to second generation computers.

question: Which is the backup storage device?
subject: Storage Devices
explanation: Floppy disk is a backup/storage device.

question: The command fixes the errors of disk.
subject: DOS Commands
explanation: Scandisk checks and fixes disk errors.

question: The command is used to remove sub-directory which contains some files.
subject: DOS Commands
explanation: Deltree removes directories including their contents.

question: The high speed and capable to support large number of devices is..........
subject: Computer Hardware
explanation: USB supports high speed and multiple devices.

question: Which command is used to go to parent directory from its sub-directory?
subject: DOS Commands
explanation: Cd.. moves to the parent directory.

question: The microprocessor contains the millions of..........
subject: Computer Hardware
explanation: Modern microprocessors contain millions of transistors.

question: Which is the characteristic of computer?
subject: Computer Fundamentals
explanation: Accuracy, reliability and speed are all characteristics of computers.

question: The term Gigabytes refers to..........
subject: Computer Memory
explanation: 1 GB = 1024 MB (megabytes).

question: The assembly language uses the..........
subject: Programming
explanation: Assembly language uses mnemonic codes.

question: The video display adapter does not support..........
subject: Computer Hardware
explanation: 12-bit is not a standard video display adapter mode.

question: Which is not input device?
subject: Input/Output Devices
explanation: Voice synthesis is an output device, not input.

question: The most popular keyboard type is..........
subject: Input Devices
explanation: QWERTY is the most popular keyboard layout.

question: The permanent memory which exhibits characteristics of RAM is..........
subject: Computer Memory
explanation: Virtual memory uses disk space like RAM.

question: Which is not true for speed of CPU?
subject: Computer Hardware
explanation: Price of CPU does not determine its speed.
